---
title: "Projects"
---

## Featured Projects

> *Code repositories are currently being cleaned, documented, and prepared for public release.*

---

<details class="project-box">
<summary>

### 🌪️ Tropical Cyclone Intensity Estimation & Forecasting (M.Tech Thesis)

![](images/cyclone1.png){width=45%}
![](images/cyclone2.png){width=45%}

</summary>

**Technologies:** Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, CNNs, ConvLSTM, Satellite & Reanalysis Data

- Developed deep learning models for tropical cyclone intensity estimation and next-frame forecasting  
- Designed spatio-temporal pipelines for multi-channel satellite inputs  
- Compared CNN, ConvLSTM, and hybrid architectures  
- Evaluated performance using RMSE and domain-specific meteorological metrics  
- Interpreted predictions for physical and meteorological consistency  

</details>

---

<details class="project-box">
<summary>

### 🩻 Thoracic Disease Detection from Chest X-rays

![](images/xray1.png){width=45%}
![](images/xray2.png){width=45%}

</summary>

**Technologies:** Python, TensorFlow, YOLO, DICOM

- YOLO-based multi-label detection across 15 diseases and 36 radiological signs  
- Benchmarked CNN architectures (ResNet, VGG) using accuracy and AUC  
- Focused on structured and interpretable outputs  

</details>

---

<details class="project-box">
<summary>

### 🧠 Hate Speech Detection using Transformers

![](images/nlp1.png){width=60%}

</summary>

**Technologies:** Python, BERT, Hugging Face Transformers, NLTK

- Fine-tuned transformer models for hate speech classification  
- Achieved improved precision and recall over traditional NLP baselines  
- Performed error analysis for robustness and generalization  

</details>
